business_angle: Chestnut Trees & Fencing - customers praise tidy finishes and quality workmanship in Exeter, EX5
distinctive_phrases: Yesterday Chestnut Trees came to fell one large tree and reduce a second by 50% in our garden
They did it in one day
They calmly and professionally completed the job and left the garden tidy
They were very communicative, polite and accommodating and I would have no hesitation in recommending them to anyone
Chestnut trees came to remove large Horse chestnut tree that had died

strongest_review_quote.text:
Yesterday Chestnut Trees came to fell one large tree and reduce a second by 50% in our garden. They did it in one day.

They cut the felled tree and branches into workable pieces which I can now easily cut into logs.

They machine chipped the smaller branches making a great mound of wood chipping which I can use as a mulch around the garden.

The logs were stacked and everything was cleared up very thoroughly.

Dan was very knowledgeable and gave us good advice before and during the job. This wa
strongest_review_quote.author: joe
